stem: A scatterplot shows a line of best fit passing through (24, 3) and (35, 9). According to the line of best fit, what is the predicted value of y when x = 30?
rationale:
Choice D is correct. Slope = (9 − 3)/(35 − 24) = 6/11 ≈ 0.545. Line: y − 3 = (6/11)(x − 24). At x = 30: y = 3 + (6/11)(6) = 3 + 36/11 ≈ 3 + 3.27 = 6.27 ≈ 6.3.

Choices A, B, and C reflect arithmetic errors.
